title: Tensura:No Game No Life
description: This is an addon for Tensura, it adds some races and skills from No Game No Life.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03553e04f70a6b94c75039f1ebfca58a18ca4f60.png)

TenReincarnation: No Game No Life is an addon sub-mod for the TenReincarnation / Tensura mod series, inspired by the anime No Game No Life.

This addon expands the existing Tensura-style race and skill system by introducing new races, evolution paths, and high-tier skills based on the No Game No Life world setting.
It is designed to integrate naturally into existing progression rather than replacing vanilla or Tensura content.

## Added Skills
Ultimate Skills

Lösen

Tengeki

Unique Skill

Magic Beads

Additional Skill

Umweg

These skills are designed for late-game or specialized builds and are closely tied to the newly added races.

## Added Races
    
1. Ex-Machina
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be8a61d4046d1599987269a0e91e90fdb450c4c7.png)
A logic- and analysis-oriented machine race with multiple role-based evolution paths.
Focuses on calculation, observation, command, and combat specialization.
 
2. Flügel
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a493dff4e67ef27c0cf4f6b1c82f0799662c9e2.png)
A high-tier magical race focused on intelligence, magic control, and overwhelming combat potential.
Evolution emphasizes pure power growth and mastery rather than branching utility.

3. Dwarf
![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e42521c333756688293b969c556ddeb8b501445.png)
An earth-aligned race with a structured evolution line.
Primarily focused on stability, endurance, and gradual power scaling.

## Why use this addon?
Expands the Tensura race system with No Game No Life–inspired content
Adds new race progression paths instead of simple stat upgrades
Designed for late-game diversity and role-based builds
Fits naturally into existing TenReincarnation gameplay

## Requirements & Notes
This is an addon mod and requires the TenReincarnation / Tensura base mod
Does not replace existing content, only extends it
Intended for players already familiar with Tensura-style evolution systems

## Text-Only Description (Accessibility)
<details> <summary>Text version of this description</summary>

TenReincarnation: No Game No Life is an addon for the TenReincarnation / Tensura mod series.
It adds new races (Ex-Machina, Flügel, and Dwarf), new ultimate and unique skills, and structured race evolution paths inspired by No Game No Life.

The addon focuses on late-game progression, role-based evolution, and compatibility with existing Tensura mechanics.
All content is designed to expand gameplay rather than replace vanilla systems.

Added Races
Machine → Analyzer
Machine → Commander → Emir Eins → Horou, God of Doubt
Machine → Design
Machine → Observer
Machine → Combat → Hubie Dora → Lösen

Flügel → Higher Flügel → Jibril → Raphael → Azril → Arutoshu

Dwarf → Nii Tiruvurugu → Veigu Doravuniru → Roni Doravuniru → Okein

</details>
